zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Mohun於大約1130年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特時，他的父親William de Mohun Earl of Somerset42歲，母親Alice De Gant11歲。他於1160年與Goda de Toni在英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1176年10月在他的家鄉享年47歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特布盧頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Mohun于大约1130年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特登斯特时，他的父亲William de Mohun Earl of Somerset42岁，母亲Alice De Gant11岁。他于1160年与Goda de Toni在英国英格兰薩默塞特登斯特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1176年10月在他的家乡享年47岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特布盧頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Moyon in La Manche. Compare   Mounce  .
Americanized form of German   Mohn   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Mohun was born about 1130, in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Mohun Earl of Somerset, was 42 and his mother, Alice De Gant, was 11. He married Goda de Toni in 1160, in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in October 1176, in his hometown, at the age of 47, and was buried in Bruton, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Mohun est né environ 1130, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Mohun Earl of Somerset, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Alice De Gant, avait 11 ans. Il a épousé Goda de Toni en 1160, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en octobre 1176, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Bruton, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Mohun um 1130 in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Mohun Earl of Somerset 42 und seine Mutter Alice De Gant 11. Er hat 1160 in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Goda de Toni geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb im Oktober 1176 im Alter von 47 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Bruton, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Mohun è nato il circa 1130 nel Dunster, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Mohun Earl of Somerset, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Alice De Gant, aveva 11 anni. Lui sposato Goda de Toni nel 1160, nel Dunster, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel ottobre 1176, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Bruton, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Mohunが約1130年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトダンスターで生まれた時，父William de Mohun Earl of Somersetは42歳，母Alice De Gantは11歳であった。1160年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトダンスターでGoda de Toniと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1176年10月に故郷で47歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトブルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Mohun(이)가 대략 1130년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 던스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Mohun Earl of Somerset(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice De Gant(은)는 11세였다. 그는 1160년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 던스터에서 Goda de Toni(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1176년 10월 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 브루턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Mohun nasceu aproximadamente 1130, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Mohun Earl of Somerset, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Alice De Gant, tinha 11 anos. Ele casou-se com Goda de Toni em 1160, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em outubro de 1176, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Bruton, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Mohun родился около 1130 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Mohun Earl of Somerset было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Alice De Gant, 11. Он женился на женщине по имени Goda de Toni в 1160 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер октябрь 1176 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности брутон, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Mohun nació aproximadamente 1130, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Mohun Earl of Somerset, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Alice De Gant, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Goda de Toni en 1160, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en octubre de 1176, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Bruton, Somerset, Inglaterra.
